shell.help-toast: Your Acuity concierge has been notified

home.needs-sign-off: {count, plural, one {# form needs your sign-off} other {# forms need your sign-off}}
home.needs-sign-off-hint: A staff-prepared draft is waiting for your review.
home.hint-handoff: Prepared by staff · needs your sign-off
home.hint-needs-input: {count, plural, one {# field needs input} other {# fields need input}}
home.hint-drafted: {count, plural, one {# field left to review} other {# fields left to review}}
home.empty-title: No forms yet. Start your first one.
home.empty-description: Bring in a patient record and we'll draft the insurer form for you to check and sign.

loop.leave-confirm-body: Your draft is saved — you can pick it up from In progress any time.

form-selection.search-company-placeholder: Search insurer — English, 繁中, or romanised
form-selection.footer-unselected: Choose an insurer, then a form, to continue
form-selection.no-company-matches: No insurer name matches that search.
form-selection.no-template-matches: No form name matches that search.
form-selection.no-companies-title: No insurers linked to this clinic
form-selection.no-companies-description: Ask your operator to enable insurers for this clinic, then try again.
form-selection.no-templates-title: No forms available for this insurer
form-selection.no-templates-description: Ask your operator to publish and enable a form for this clinic.

intake.paste-instruction: Paste the patient's record or notes
intake.paste-instruction-limit: Paste the patient's record or notes — up to {limit} MB.
intake.paste-placeholder: Paste the patient's record or notes
intake.import-empty: No recent captures — upload a file, or paste instead.
intake.over-limit: That record is larger than {limit} MB — try a smaller export or paste the relevant part.
intake.pdf-only: Please choose a PDF medical record.
intake.footer-hint: Up to {limit} MB · paste is always available

medical-review.missing-pdf: No medical PDF yet — go back to upload one.
medical-review.form-pdf-empty: No form draft yet — fill the fields on the right and tap Save draft to preview the filled insurer PDF here.
medical-review.fields-hint-done: AI extraction finished — review the fields and edit anything that needs correcting.
medical-review.start-hint: Review the standard field list against the PDF, then select AI Extract to begin.
medical-review.running-hint: Extraction is in progress. See the current step over the PDF.
medical-review.fields-empty: This form has no standard fields to review yet.
medical-review.not-completed: Extraction did not complete and no review result was generated
medical-review.completed-empty-toast: Pipeline finished, but AI left fields empty (local stub may be active). Fill them manually, or re-authenticate Gemini and retry.
medical-review.visit-hint: Multiple visits were found. Pick the one for this claim to continue.
medical-review.required-missing-hint: These fields are empty. Go back to fill them in, or continue signing — we'll fill the insurer template with the current values and open the preview.

extraction.progress-escalated: This is taking a moment — still working.
extraction.ai-unavailable: AI drafting is unavailable right now — you can fill this form yourself. Nothing is lost.

review.summary-all-confirmed: All fields confirmed — ready to sign
review.intake-source-manual: Manual entry — AI drafting was unavailable
review.manual-mode-notice: AI drafting is unavailable right now — you can fill this form yourself, nothing is lost.
review.handoff-banner-title: Prepared by staff · needs your sign-off
review.handoff-banner-note: Note from {staff}: “{note}” Staff-entered fields stay unconfirmed until you confirm them.
review.where-from-title: Where this came from — show in your notes
review.notes-empty: Your uploaded record will appear here.
review.sign-off-disabled-reason: {count, plural, one {# field still needs review before you can produce} other {# fields still need review before you can produce}}
review.sign-off-preview-title: You're about to sign and submit your {company} form
review.sign-off-preview-body: You are signing as the attending physician. Your signature on file will be applied to the insurer's PDF.
review.sign-off-validation: Some required fields still need confirming — they're marked below.
review.save-error: We couldn't save that change — it's been rolled back. Try again.
review.conflict-error: This form was changed in another window. We've reloaded the latest — please re-check this field.
review.read-only-role: Only the attending doctor can sign this form.
review.shortcuts-intro: Work the review list without the mouse. Keys are inactive while you are typing in a field.
review.shortcut-return: Leave the field, back to the list

produce.producing-hint: Filling the insurer form and generating the PDF
produce.producing-step: Step {step} of {total} — filling the insurer's form
produce.success-description: The filled policy PDF has been saved. You can download a copy any time from your completed forms.
produce.send-failed: Send didn't go through — your form is ready to download.
produce.self-verification-blocked-body: We couldn't confirm the form filled correctly, so we've held delivery and flagged it. Re-trying may need our help. Your data is fine.
produce.not-ready: Fields are not confirmed yet — policy PDF preview is unavailable.
produce.preview-failed: Could not load the policy PDF

history.heading: Your forms
history.search-placeholder: Search by patient, insurer, or form
history.download-failed: Could not download the policy PDF. Please try again.
history.delete-confirm-body: This can't be undone. The submission, field data, and the filled policy PDF will be permanently deleted.
history.delete-failed: Could not delete the form. Please try again.
history.empty-description: Start a form and it will appear here.

patients.heading: Patients
patients.search-placeholder: Search patients — English, 繁中, or romanised
patients.row-meta: {count, plural, one {# form} other {# forms}} · last activity {when}
patients.status-needs-sign-off: {count, plural, one {# needs sign-off} other {# need sign-off}}
patients.start-form-for-patient: Start a form for this patient
patients.empty-description: Start a form and we'll list the patient here.

settings.heading: Account and settings
settings.signature-empty: Upload your signature once — we'll use it on every form, and never ask again.
settings.signature-hint: Used on every form. Never re-asked.
settings.language-hint: Selects the running-copy language. Per-field form data keeps its own locale.
settings.idle-lock-out-of-range: Choose a value between 2 and 30 minutes.
settings.help-body: Contact your Acuity concierge — we onboard and support every clinic directly.
settings.help-sent: Your Acuity concierge has been notified
settings.save-failed: We couldn't save that — try again.

system.impersonation-viewing: Acuity support is viewing this session
system.impersonation-acting: Acuity support is acting in this session
system.idle-lock-body: Locked to protect patient data. Unlock to continue — your work is saved.
system.support-access-body: Your session was accessed by Acuity support on {when} for: resolving a form-pack rendering issue you reported.
system.session-expired-body: Sign in again to continue — your work is saved.

errors.network: We couldn't reach the workspace — check your connection and try again.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our side. Try again in a moment.
errors.conflict: This was changed in another window — we've reloaded the latest.
errors.validation: Some details need another look — they're marked below.
errors.session-expired: Your session has expired — sign in again to continue.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to that.
errors.rate-limited: Too many requests — give it a moment and try again.
errors.ai-unavailable: AI drafting is unavailable right now.
errors.claim-not-found-body: It may have been removed, or it belongs to another clinic. Your own forms are safe in your workspace.
errors.route-error-body: The page hit an unexpected error. Your forms are safe in your workspace.

not-found.title: We couldn't find that page
not-found.body: It may have moved, or the link is out of date.
